description_long: This is a two-seater wooden-framed couch with a classic, boxy silhouette and prominent vertical columns at each corner. The frame is constructed from medium-toned wood with a darker wood trim along the top edges, giving it a refined, traditional appearance. The seat and back cushions are upholstered in a light brown, leather-like material with a subtle, embossed floral pattern, and are divided into two distinct sections for both the seat and back. The legs are short, blocky, and integrated into the frame, providing a sturdy base. The armrests are wide, flat, and at the same height as the backrest, forming a continuous rectangular enclosure. There are no visible accent pillows or decorative elements beyond the patterned upholstery.
description: A classic two-seater couch with a wooden frame, dark trim, and light brown patterned leather cushions. The design features wide, flat armrests and divided seat and back cushions.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid wood panel and one armrest, with the backrest and cushion partially visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying both seat and back cushions, the full width of the armrests, and the detailed wood trim.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, highlighting the other armrest and the same solid wood panel.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the continuous wooden back panel and the tops of the armrests, with no cushions visible.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two seat cushions and two back cushions, all divided and fitted, with no visible accent or throw pillows; cushions appear attached or integrated.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Light brown leather-like upholstery with a subtle, embossed floral pattern; no tufting or decorative stitching.
attribute_leg_style: Short, block-style wooden legs integrated into the frame, mostly hidden by the lower wood panels.
attribute_armrest_design: Wide, flat, rectangular armrests at the same height as the backrest, made of wood with a dark trim on top.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, and continuous backrest with two divided, cushioned sections; cushions appear attached and not tufted.
